title: Armor Stand from MC Dungeons
description: Changes the Armor Stand model to a mannequin from Minecraft Dungeons
body:
This resource pack changes the Armor Stand model to a mannequin from Minecraft Dungeons. Also  Requires Optifine or EntityModelFeatures(+ Entitytexturefeatures) 
How it looks without Resource Pack:
![How it looks without Resource Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/94bedfcbd89cc3cdf90879995afb3ac61ebe85bf.png)
How it looks with Resource Pack:
![How it looks with Resource Pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5a453e60ad6788e52617f7416f9c22b7f8827c0.png)

It's still in beta stage. That's why bugs may appear.
